name: Chrome Extension Installed Outside of the Webstore
description: Detects the installation of Chrome extensions from sources other than the official Chrome Web Store. This can indicate the presence of malicious extensions that may compromise user data or system security.

prompts.prompt: Medium-severity alert: A Chrome extension has been detected that was installed from outside the official Chrome Web Store. This could indicate a potentially malicious extension or an unauthorized installation, posing a risk to user data and system security. Event Details: **Timestamp** {timestamp}, **Extension Name** {name}, **Identifier** {identifier}, **Version** {version}, **Path** {path}, **Installed from Webstore** {columns_from_webstore}. Investigate the legitimacy of this extension and consider its removal if unauthorized or suspicious.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the detection event.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the Chrome extension.

parameters.name: identifier
parameters.description: The unique identifier (ID) of the Chrome extension.

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: The version of the Chrome extension.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: The file system path where the Chrome extension is located.

parameters.name: columns_from_webstore
parameters.description: Indicates if the extension was installed from the Chrome Web Store ('0' for not from webstore, '1' for from webstore).
